entries.statement: The competition asked for epistemic tooling on hard contested questions, its three named cases being pandemic origins, black holes, and eggs: turn messy sources into typed claims tied to their origins, make the relations among claims legible, tell a reader what to believe and what to look at next, scale with better AI, and compound across people and teams.

canonical.statement: The competition asked for epistemic tooling on hard contested questions, its three named cases being pandemic origins, black holes, and eggs: turn messy sources into typed claims tied to their origins, make the relations among claims legible, tell a reader what to believe and what to look at next, scale with better AI, and compound across people and teams.

entries.statement: This submission reads all of that as one goal: knowledge that survives attenuation.

canonical.statement: This submission reads all of that as one goal: knowledge that survives attenuation.

entries.statement: A claim counts as knowledge when it still stands after trust in whoever produced it is dialed down toward zero, and work compounds exactly when communities' claims compose without importing each other's authority.

canonical.statement: A claim counts as knowledge when it still stands after trust in whoever produced it is dialed down toward zero, and work compounds exactly when communities' claims compose without importing each other's authority.

entries.statement: The internet, in three configurations, carrying claims on a substrate that sees only packets.

canonical.statement: The internet, in three configurations, carrying claims on a substrate that sees only packets.

entries.statement: A cooperative kernel where social accountability supplied the verification; the same contracts meeting an adversarial population; a patched kernel where authorities compensate for standing that does not recompute.

canonical.statement: A cooperative kernel where social accountability supplied the verification; the same contracts meeting an adversarial population; a patched kernel where authorities compensate for standing that does not recompute.

entries.statement: Each era, encoded as a kernel and run through the protocol's conformance checker, violates exactly the invariants the contracts fix, with each violation mapped to a documented failure, so the recentralization is derived rather than asserted.

canonical.statement: Each era, encoded as a kernel and run through the protocol's conformance checker, violates exactly the invariants the contracts fix, with each violation mapped to a documented failure, so the recentralization is derived rather than asserted.

entries.statement: The same trajectory is now beginning one layer up, over claims themselves.

canonical.statement: The same trajectory is now beginning one layer up, over claims themselves.

entries.statement: The history above is what recursive modelers do to fixed trust signals: model them, aim at them, and manufacture them cheaper than the substance they once certified.

canonical.statement: The history above is what recursive modelers do to fixed trust signals: model them, aim at them, and manufacture them cheaper than the substance they once certified.

entries.statement: The division that survives this: fix the little that composition and adversaries require, as contracts, and leave every semantic judgment free, as parameters, because semantic controls spend the exact variety communities need for judging.

canonical.statement: The division that survives this: fix the little that composition and adversaries require, as contracts, and leave every semantic judgment free, as parameters, because semantic controls spend the exact variety communities need for judging.

entries.statement: Eleven fixed contracts and a gate.

canonical.statement: Eleven fixed contracts and a gate.

entries.statement: Claims are typed and content-addressed; a grade recomputes from the public graph; an import grounds nothing until a local fork types it; views move no grade.

canonical.statement: Claims are typed and content-addressed; a grade recomputes from the public graph; an import grounds nothing until a local fork types it; views move no grade.

entries.statement: Everything else, the type systems, the standing rules, the forums, the licenses, is a free parameter, and a boundary linter holds the two registers disjoint.

canonical.statement: Everything else, the type systems, the standing rules, the forums, the licenses, is a free parameter, and a boundary linter holds the two registers disjoint.

entries.statement: Every mature institution runs these mechanisms by hand: precedent chains in common law, dependency graphs in software, replication in science, load orders in game modding, slashing in decentralized finance.

canonical.statement: Every mature institution runs these mechanisms by hand: precedent chains in common law, dependency graphs in software, replication in science, load orders in game modding, slashing in decentralized finance.

entries.statement: The lineage corpus grounds that record and one conjecture: nothing yet composes all five axes for empirical and contested knowledge.

canonical.statement: The lineage corpus grounds that record and one conjecture: nothing yet composes all five axes for empirical and contested knowledge.

entries.statement: A feed over typed claims

canonical.statement: A feed over typed claims

entries.statement: every grade computed on your device from the public graph

canonical.statement: every grade computed on your device from the public graph

entries.statement: the ranking set by you and moving no grade

canonical.statement: the ranking set by you and moving no grade

entries.statement: The repository's checks rerun in about two minutes

canonical.statement: The repository's checks rerun in about two minutes

entries.statement: the substrate is pinned to the protocol by commit and hash

canonical.statement: the substrate is pinned to the protocol by commit and hash

entries.statement: Grades are computed on device from the public graph.

canonical.statement: Grades are computed on device from the public graph.

entries.statement: A grade is a computed reading, never a claim of truth.

canonical.statement: A grade is a computed reading, never a claim of truth.

entries.statement: Ranking cannot modify canonical standing, grades, receipts, robustness, or support structure.

checking_records.method: test-execution evidence (kernel/governance/local-source-classes.md, the no-grade-motion property test named there): fuzzes 25 random objective vectors per fixture and asserts the raw snapshot, api.read(), api.reconciliations(), and api.gaps() stay byte-identical before and after; statically verifies api/ranking.js and api/feed.js import nothing that can write

canonical.statement: Ranking cannot modify canonical standing, grades, receipts, robustness, or support structure.

entries.statement: This client holds no capability any client with the snapshot lacks.

checking_records.method: test-execution evidence (kernel/governance/local-source-classes.md): an independent minimal client built from vendor/api/* alone reproduces this app's reads byte-identically over the same snapshot

entries.statement: All inherited substrate code matches the lock.

checking_records.method: recomputes the sha256 of every vendored file and compares it to upstream/lock.json; recomputes the upstream/epistack submodule's checked-out commit and compares it to lock.commit_hash

canonical.method: recomputes the sha256 of every vendored file and compares it to upstream/lock.json; recomputes the upstream/epistack submodule's checked-out commit and compares it to lock.commit_hash

sources.description: this deployment's own front page (index.html): the submission's argument, restated as the definitional and app-behavior claims the page itself stipulates or already grounds elsewhere in this kernel

the epistack submission repository's own docs and corpora, cited by the front page's own doors; these claims enter at the honest floor a citation alone ever earns, awaiting a local fork that would type them

knowledge-game-spec-v2.md (this deployment's own specification, Sections 2, 5, and 9) and kernel/governance/stage-0.md, the asserting source for every governance claim this kernel carries about the app's own behavior
